name: Zombie Hunter
short_description: You'll have to build your own shelter in a hot air balloon, wander between islands, collect supplies, and hunt down all kinds of powerful zombies on each island. It is a difficult survival, construction, shooting, horror game.
detailed_description: You'll have to build your own shelter in a hot air balloon, grow crops, wander between islands, gather supplies, and hunt down powerful zombies on each island. It is a difficult survival, construction, shooting, horror game.
about_the_game: You'll have to build your own shelter in a hot air balloon, grow crops, wander between islands, gather supplies, and hunt down powerful zombies on each island. It is a difficult survival, construction, shooting, horror game.
supported_languages:
